case_title: C A KILGER MACHINE WORKS, INC. VS BAY AREA LINEN AND VALET SERVICE, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,943.02 FILED BY C A KILGER MACHINE WORKS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA LINEN AND VALET SERVICE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C A KILGER MACHINE WORKS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY AREA LINEN AND VALET SERVICE, INC. $1,633.75 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,713.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BAY AREA LINEN AND VALET SERVICE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BAY AREA LINEN AND VALET SERVICE, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT C A KILGER MACHINE WORKS, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BAY AREA LINEN AND VALET SERVICE, INC. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT C A KILGER MACHINE WORKS, INC. $2,128.75 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,278.75, ($150 COSTS IS ATTORNEY FEES) PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANT $495 THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN THE TWO JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF C A KILGER MACHINE WORKS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C A KILGER MACHINE WORKS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY AREA LINEN AND VALET SERVICE, INC. $1,633.75 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,783.75, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27133 ON 4/23/03 NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION ($150 COST IS FOR ATTORNEY FEES) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA LINEN AND VALET SERVICE, INC.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BAY AREA LINEN AND VALET SERVICE, INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT C A KILGER MACHINE WORKS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-25-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-10-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27133, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
